dialogue.speaker: Parent
dialogue.text: Let's check the map and prioritize. How tall are you?

dialogue.speaker: Child
dialogue.text: I am tall enough for most rides. Let's start with the _____ games!

dialogue.speaker: Parent
dialogue.text: Great idea! We will win some prizes!

amusementpark.text:
Parent: If we get separated, let's meet at the main _____. Keep my phone number handy!
Child: Okay! I will be careful.
How should you plan your amusement park visit?
options: Prioritize rides, rest during peak hours, bring snacks and water.

amusementpark.text:
Child: This was such an amazing ___! I want to come back again!
Parent: Yes! We had so much fun today.

picnic.text:
Parent: Let's pack some _____ for our picnic. Sandwiches, fruits, and juice!
Child: I am getting hungry already!
What makes a good picnic spot?
options: Open space, shade, water access, safe environment, and scenic views.

dialogue.speaker: Parent
dialogue.text: Help me spread out the _____, please.

dialogue.speaker: Child
dialogue.text: Okay! Where should we put the food?

dialogue.speaker: Parent
dialogue.text: Keep it away from ants. Let's put it under this tree where it is _____.

dialogue.speaker: Child
dialogue.text: Perfect! This is going to be so much fun!

picnic.text:
Family: Let's play some games and enjoy the fresh _____ in nature!
Child: I love picnics so much!
What is important when leaving a picnic spot?
options: Pack all trash, leave no litter, restore the area to its original state.

picnic.text:
Parent: Thank you all for a wonderful ___! Let's come back again soon!
Family: Yes! Let's make this a regular thing!

directions.text:
Stranger: Excuse me! Can you tell me how to get to the _____?
You: Of course! Follow this road straight ahead.
How do landmarks help with directions?
options: They help you recognize where you are and navigate more easily.

dialogue.speaker: Person
dialogue.text: I am looking for the nearest _____. Can you help?

dialogue.speaker: You
dialogue.text: Yes! Go straight for two blocks.

dialogue.speaker: Person
dialogue.text: Then what? Should I turn left or _____?

dialogue.speaker: You
dialogue.text: Turn right at the traffic light. The hospital is on your left!

directions.text:
Sign: The museum is to the _____ of the city center. You need to go north!
Traveler: Thank you for the clear instructions!
If you get lost, what should you do?
options: Ask locals for directions, use a map, or call someone for help.

directions.text:
Local: The beach is about three kilometers from here. It will take about _____ to walk there.
Visitor: Thank you! That helps me plan.

jewelry.text:
Jeweler: Welcome! What _____ are you looking for today?
Customer: I need a bracelet for my sister's birthday.

options: Gold, silver, platinum, gemstones, and other precious materials.

dialogue.speaker: You
dialogue.text: This necklace is beautiful! Is it made of _____?

dialogue.speaker: Jeweler
dialogue.text: Yes, it is 18-karat gold. Pure and high quality.

dialogue.speaker: You
dialogue.text: And do you have a _____ for it?

dialogue.speaker: Jeweler
dialogue.text: Of course! All our jewelry comes with a certificate.

jewelry.text:
Jeweler: To keep your jewelry shiny, _____ it gently and store it safely.
Customer: Thank you for the care tips!

options: Material type, weight, design complexity, and gemstone quality.

jewelry.text:
Jeweler: We can _____ a special piece just for you! Tell us your design ideas!
Customer: That sounds wonderful!
